channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'American Struggle' author assesses Trump's expansion of presidential power
item.description: Pulitzer Prize-winning historian Jon Meacham talks about Trump's impact on democracy. Meacham's latest book is a collection of speeches, letters and o...

item.title: How to register to vote in the 2026 primaries
item.description: For the 2026 primary elections, NPR has collected deadlines and information on how to register to vote — online, in person or by mail — in every U.S. ...

item.title: U.S. Olympic speed skaters adapt NASCAR 'bump drafting,' revolutionizing team event
item.description: U.S. Team Pursuit speed skaters will top speeds of 30 mph by pushing themselves around the track mere inches from each other.

item.title: Israel will begin contentious West Bank land registration
item.description: Israel will begin a contentious land regulation process in a large part of the occupied West Bank, which could result in Israel gaining control over w...

item.title: Is that carb ultra-processed? Here's a test even a kid can do
item.description: The latest nutrition guidelines urge Americans to avoid highly-processed food. But, when it comes to carbs, many people don't know which ones are ultr...

item.title: Nigeria warns against enlisting abroad after reports of deaths in Ukraine
item.description: The authorities say a growing number of citizens are being illegally recruited to fight elsewhere.

item.title: What's open and closed on Presidents Day 2026?
item.description: Most retail and food establishments will remain open, but services like mail delivery will be suspended for the federal holiday.

item.title: Lindsey Vonn discharged, preparing to leave Italy after Olympics crash
item.description: The chief of the U.S. Ski Team says Lindsey Vonn is preparing to return to the United States a week after crashing in the Olympic downhill.

item.title: U.S. military boards another oil tanker after tracking it from Caribbean
item.description: U.S. military forces boarded another sanctioned tanker​ in the Indian Ocean after tracking the vessel from the Caribbean Sea in an effort to target il...

item.title: 8 dead in blast, blaze in fireworks shop in China ahead of Chinese New Year
item.description: An explosion and fire at a fireworks shop in eastern China has killed eight people and left two others with minor burns ahead of the Chinese New Year,...

item.title: Trump eyes Venezuela visit – but obstacles to his oil plan remain
item.description: The US president wants American energy firms to start extracting the crude but they are reluctant.

item.title: What is the dart frog toxin allegedly used to kill Alexei Navalny?
item.description: The toxin, epibatidine, can be found in frogs in the wild in South America or manufactured in a lab.

item.title: ByteDance to curb AI video app after Disney legal threat
item.description: Videos featuring Spider-Man and other characters which are Disney's intellectual property have gone viral since Seedance's update.

item.title: Kenya strike delays flights at international hub airport
item.description: Authorities say they have put in place contingency measures as a labour dispute affects travel.

item.title: Guthrie suspect's mask, clothing believed to be from Walmart, sheriff says
item.description: Pima County Sheriff Chris Nanos told CBS News the suspect's backpack is one of the most promising leads in the case, as the search continues for Nancy...

item.title: DNA recovered from glove found near Guthrie home that appears to match glove worn by suspect, FBI says
item.description: The FBI says a glove containing DNA was found about two miles from Nancy Guthrie’s Arizona home and appears to match those worn by a masked person out...

item.title: No clear path to ending the partial government shutdown as lawmakers dig in over DHS oversight
Trump’s border czar says ‘small’ security force will remain in Minnesota after enforcement drawdown
